sample_requests: Help me preprocess an AnnData object for downstream dynamo analysis
Convert the preprocess tutorial notebook into an executable workflow using the current Preprocessor API

smoke_commands.name: import-preprocessor-interface
smoke_commands.command: ${PYTHON} -c "import numpy as np; import anndata as ad; from dynamo.preprocessing import Preprocessor; adata = ad.AnnData(X=np.abs(np.random.poisson(1, (20, 10))).astype(float)); p = Preprocessor(); print(Preprocessor.__name__); print(hasattr(p, 'preprocess_adata'))"
